caption: In a formal assembly setting with green carpeting and ornate wooden desks, several individuals are seated. In the foreground, a man wearing a white shirt and a black vest sits behind a desk, while another man in a white shirt sits to his right. Behind them, others are seated, including a man in a pink shirt, a woman in a yellow outfit, and a man in a white shirt. A man in a blue shirt is positioned to the left, partially visible. Throughout the sequence, the people remain largely stationary, though the man in the white shirt to the right of the man in the black vest shifts his posture and adjusts his hand near his face. The lighting is bright and consistent, and the scene remains focused on this group of people within the assembly hall, with no visible text, logos, or significant changes in the environment.
